brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver promote of BEA Regional Price Parities from bronze.bea_rpp (51 rows: 50 states + DC) to base.bea_rpp. Smallest Silver transformation in the project — no joins, no concept normalization, no cross-source work. Carries geo_fips/geo_name through as state_fips/state_name; passes rpp_all_items and data_year through verbatim; renames load_date to source_load_date. Derives four new columns from the canonical state_fips grain: state_abbr via FIPS_TO_USPS 51-entry lookup (structural U.S. geography, in-code constant in src/silver/_us_state_reference.py), census_region via FIPS_TO_CENSUS_REGION lookup (DC documented quirk — placed in 'South' per U.S. Census convention despite Northeast-like RPP), purchasing_power_multiplier as 100.0 / rpp_all_items (single source of truth for salary scaling across Gold/MCP/frontend), and verification_status via the 8-state BEA_VERIFIED_FIPS allow-list (CA, HI, DC, NJ, AR, MS, IA, OK -> 'bea_official'; all other 43 -> 'estimate', implementing Bronze staff-review Ruling 2 / Condition 6). Framework fields: record_id via compute_grain_id(['state_fips'], prefix='rpp'); ingested_at stamped at promotion time by transform_row. Idempotent promote pattern via brightsmith.infra.promote: re-running produces 0 new rows. No raw metadata (source_url, source_method) is carried forward — those stop at the Bronze layer.

documentation.description: Promote bronze.bea_rpp to base.bea_rpp (Silver base). Validates 2-digit state FIPS against the 51-entry US state reference, renames geo_fips/geo_name/load_date to state_fips/state_name/source_load_date, derives state_abbr and census_region from in-code FIPS lookups (src/silver/_us_state_reference.py), pre-computes purchasing_power_multiplier = 100.0 / rpp_all_items as the single source of truth for salary scaling, derives per-row verification_status from the 8-state BEA allow-list, passes rpp_all_items and data_year through, stamps ingested_at, computes a deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id(['state_fips'], prefix='rpp'), and promotes via the idempotent Brightsmith promote pattern (append with dedup on record_id).

fields.name: rpp_all_items
fields.description: Regional Price Parity index, All Items (national = 100.0)

fields.name: data_year
fields.description: Year of the RPP estimate (2024 for this vintage)

fields.name: ingested_at
fields.description: Bronze ingest timestamp — not carried to Silver

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: BEA API URL (redacted) — not carried to Silver

fields.name: source_method
fields.description: bea_api or csv_cache — not carried to Silver

fields.name: load_date
fields.description: Bronze load date, renamed to source_load_date in Silver

documentation.description: In-code 51-entry reference module loaded by the Silver transformer. Provides FIPS_TO_USPS (state FIPS -> 2-letter USPS code), FIPS_TO_CENSUS_REGION (state FIPS -> Northeast/Midwest/South/West per U.S. Census Bureau), and BEA_VERIFIED_FIPS ({'06','15','11','34','05','28','19','40'} — the 8 states with spec-verified RPP values). Treated as structural U.S. geography, not entity-specific data.

fields.name: FIPS_TO_CENSUS_REGION
fields.description: 51 entries: state_fips -> Northeast | Midwest | South | West

fields.name: BEA_VERIFIED_FIPS
fields.description: 8 BEA-verified state FIPS codes for the 2024 SARPP vintage

fields.name: state_fips
fields.transformation: RENAME from bronze.geo_fips (validated against 51-entry FIPS_TO_USPS and 2-digit regex)

fields.name: data_year
fields.transformation: DIRECT passthrough from bronze.data_year (default 2024 if null)

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain id computed by compute_grain_id(record, ['state_fips'], prefix='rpp') after state_fips is normalized from bronze.geo_fips. Provides a stable natural key for the idempotent promote pattern's dedup step.

state_fips.transformationDescription: Identity transform with validation. _validate_state_fips strips whitespace, enforces the ^\d{2}$ regex, and requires membership in the 51-entry FIPS_TO_USPS lookup (50 states + DC). No value rewriting — the bytes are identical to bronze.geo_fips on success.

state_name.transformationDescription: Identity transform with null/empty guard. str(value).strip() — raises ValueError on missing or whitespace-only state_name. No relabeling or canonicalization of state names.

state_abbr.transformationDescription: derive_state_abbr(state_fips) performs FIPS_TO_USPS[state_fips] — a 51-entry in-code constant lookup of the USPS 2-letter uppercase abbreviation. Raises ValueError if the FIPS is not in the table. The lookup is treated as structural U.S. geography rather than entity-specific data, so it lives in src/silver/_us_state_reference.py rather than a governance file.

census_region.transformationDescription: derive_census_region(state_fips) performs FIPS_TO_CENSUS_REGION[state_fips] — a 51-entry in-code constant lookup returning one of {'Northeast', 'Midwest', 'South', 'West'} per the U.S. Census Bureau's four-region grouping. Documented quirk: DC (FIPS '11') maps to 'South' per Census convention, despite DC's Northeast-like RPP. Raises ValueError on unknown FIPS.

rpp_all_items.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough. float(value) coercion only — no rescaling, no unit change. Value remains on the BEA national=100 index scale. Null raises ValueError (enforces P0 non-null invariant from the Silver DQ rules).

purchasing_power_multiplier.transformationDescription: derive_purchasing_power_multiplier(rpp) computes 100.0 / rpp_all_items as a double. Guards against None, zero, and NaN. Pre-computed here so every downstream consumer (Gold consumable.regional_price_parities, MCP tools get_regional_price_parity and compare_purchasing_power, the frontend salary-adjustment display) reads the same canonical value. Inverse invariant purchasing_power_multiplier * rpp_all_items ≈ 100.0 is enforced as a P0 DQ rule.

verification_status.transformationDescription: derive_verification_status(state_fips) returns 'bea_official' iff state_fips is in the BEA_VERIFIED_FIPS allow-list {'06','15','11','34','05','28','19','40'} (CA, HI, DC, NJ, AR, MS, IA, OK), else 'estimate'. Closes Bronze HIGH-3 / raw-ingest-bea-rpp-staff-review.md Ruling 2 / Condition 6 by surfacing provenance on a per-row basis. Expected distribution for the 2026-04-10 vintage: 8 bea_official, 43 estimate. When the live BEA API refresh lands post-hackathon, the allow-list expands to all 51 codes and every row flips to bea_official without schema changes.

data_year.transformationDescription: Direct passthrough. int(value) coercion; if null, defaults to DEFAULT_DATA_YEAR = 2024. For the current Bronze vintage every row has data_year = 2024, which is enforced by the P0 DQ rule data_year = 2024 and COUNT(DISTINCT data_year) = 1. Single-vintage supersession-by-replacement contract inherited from raw-ingest-bea-rpp.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Rename with identity value. bronze.load_date is carried forward verbatim as source_load_date to preserve the Bronze vintage stamp at the Silver grain. Raises ValueError on missing load_date to catch malformed Bronze snapshots.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: Framework-injected: Silver promotion UTC timestamp stamped by transform_row at row-build time (datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc) by default; tests pass a fixed value for determinism). Distinct from bronze.ingested_at, which is not carried forward.
